focus: [D4-A2/D4] od CLI Bash bypass: PreToolUse matcher for daemon-cli.mjs write verbs run start/ui respond/media generate

graphEvents.label: How can Codex PreToolUse block Open Design CLI write verbs invoked through Bash unless sk-design context is carried into the command?
The installed daemon-cli.mjs and CLI chunk expose concrete write verbs run start, ui respond, and media generate that can be matched at the Bash boundary
The current Codex PreToolUse policy is Bash-only and literal-denylist based, so it needs a structured odCliPreconditions lane rather than raw patterns like run start
A CLI skDesignGate cannot live only in transcript prose; the Bash hook needs an inspectable same-command gate file or equivalent token pointer
A Bash matcher closes daemon-cli.mjs shell-outs but does not cover direct MCP, HTTP, in-app Skills, or child runtimes outside the hook envelope
Any recognized daemon-cli.mjs design-affecting write verb must deny before execution unless a current content-bound skDesignGate is present
The matcher must bind Open Design CLI identity and mutating verb in the same command segment; verb-only patterns are too broad

label: The installed daemon-cli.mjs and CLI chunk expose concrete write verbs run start, ui respond, and media generate that can be matched at the Bash boundary
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE on canonical Bash command corpus; ADVISORY for hidden aliases/functions

label: The current Codex PreToolUse policy is Bash-only and literal-denylist based, so it needs a structured odCliPreconditions lane rather than raw patterns like run start
A CLI skDesignGate cannot live only in transcript prose; the Bash hook needs an inspectable same-command gate file or equivalent token pointer
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for command transcript plus filesystem fixtures; ADVISORY for design quality

label: A Bash matcher closes daemon-cli.mjs shell-outs but does not cover direct MCP, HTTP, in-app Skills, or child runtimes outside the hook envelope
enforcement: ENFORCEABLE for Codex Bash calls; ADVISORY cross-runtime until each surface has an interceptor

label: Any recognized daemon-cli.mjs design-affecting write verb must deny before execution unless a current content-bound skDesignGate is present
The matcher must bind Open Design CLI identity and mutating verb in the same command segment; verb-only patterns are too broad

direction: Add raw bashDenylist strings such as run start, ui respond, or media generate
reason: Verb-only patterns are both overbroad and incomplete; the guard must bind daemon-cli.mjs/Open Design CLI identity and mutating verb in the same command segment.

label: D4-A2 adds the CLI Bash bypass answer: guard daemon-cli.mjs write verbs with structured odCliPreconditions, not raw bashDenylist strings; require a same-command content-bound skDesignGate file/token for run start, ui respond, and media generate; keep the guarded MCP/proxy route for non-Bash surfaces.
